brief_notes: Well-structured paper with clear narrative arc from behavior to imaging to optogenetics to GLM. Writing quality is high with precise terminology. However, multiple results tables have N/A for all group summary statistics (means, SDs, effect sizes) with only p-values and test names retained, which significantly weakens rigor and presentation -- readers cannot evaluate effect magnitude. The training table (Table 1) is strong with full F-stats and df. Citations are realistic and appropriate (Skaggs, Hardcastle, Mogenson, etc.). Figures are included via includegraphics. Table audit: PASSED -- no qualitative cell values found; all unavailable data uses N/A with explanatory footnotes.
